steps.title: Write the probability formula and substitute given values
steps.content:
Probability equals the ratio of favorable outcomes to total outcomes. Given that $P(\text{blue}) = 0.40$ and there are 70 total marbles:
$$0.40 = \frac{\text{blue marbles}}{70}$$

steps.title: Solve for the number of blue marbles
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by 70:
$$\text{blue marbles} = 0.40 \times 70 = 28$$
That matches Choice A — 28.
